author: 0xrubo
content: <@774033563732541451> hey. to benchmark nethermind with [zkevm-benchmark-workload](https://github.com/eth-act/zkevm-benchmark-workload), we have a tool that converts json fixtures by `witness-generator-cli` to ssz. i noticed `witness-generator-spec-cli` puts ssz input in its fixtures; can't we use that instead?
